ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the transaction occurred */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "market_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market center where the transaction took place */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Indicates whether the transaction is a buy or sell */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order from which the transaction was executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker who executed the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_market_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_center_id") REFERENCES market_centers ("market_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_centers" (
  "market_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market center */,
  "market_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the market center (e.g., NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market center */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market center */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the market center */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price of the stock */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Daily trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance) */,
  "market_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market center the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_market_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_center_id") REFERENCES market_centers ("market_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol related to the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, news) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, dismissed) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "chat_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chat message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., text, image, document) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the message (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "read_time" TEXT /* Time when the message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
